<div class="sphinxpress-doc">
<section id="development">
<h1>Development</h1>
<section id="environment">
<h2>Environment</h2>
<p>Use Python 3.10 or newer.</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>python<span class="w"> </span>-m<span class="w"> </span>pip<span class="w"> </span>install<span class="w"> </span>-e<span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">&quot;.[dev,docs]&quot;</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>The package uses Hatchling with VCS-based dynamic versioning.</p>
</section>
<section id="runtime-dependencies">
<h2>Runtime dependencies</h2>
<p>The runtime dependencies include:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">typer</span></code></p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">rich</span></code></p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">pydantic&gt;=2</span></code></p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">tomli-w</span></code></p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">tomli</span></code> on Python older than 3.11</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">beautifulsoup4</span></code></p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">markdown-it-py</span></code></p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">phrasplit</span></code></p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">epub2text&gt;=0.2.4</span></code></p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">text2epub</span></code></p></li>
</ul>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">ebooklib</span></code> and <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">mypy</span></code> are included in the <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">dev</span></code> extra so the documented test/type-check commands run after a single editable install. <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">docs/conf.py</span></code> (Sphinx, MyST, Read the Docs theme) is covered by the <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">docs</span></code> extra. To install everything at once:</p>
</section>
<section id="docs-dependencies">
<h2>Docs dependencies</h2>
<p>The <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">docs</span></code> extra installs the packages used by <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">docs/conf.py</span></code> (Sphinx, MyST, Read the Docs theme):</p>
<div class="highlight-toml notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="k">[project.optional-dependencies]</span>
<span class="n">docs</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">=</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="s2">&quot;sphinx&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="s2">&quot;myst-parser&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="s2">&quot;sphinx-rtd-theme&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="test-commands">
<h2>Test commands</h2>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>pytest<span class="w"> </span>-q
ruff<span class="w"> </span>check<span class="w"> </span>.
</pre></div>
</div>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>pytest<span class="w"> </span>-q
ruff<span class="w"> </span>check<span class="w"> </span>.
mypy<span class="w"> </span>booktx
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>For documentation changes, install the <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">docs</span></code> extra and run the repository’s
warnings-as-errors check:</p>
<div class="highlight-bash notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span>python<span class="w"> </span>-m<span class="w"> </span>pytest<span class="w"> </span>tests/test_docs_consistency.py<span class="w"> </span>-q
sphinx-build<span class="w"> </span>-W<span class="w"> </span>-b<span class="w"> </span>html<span class="w"> </span>docs<span class="w"> </span>docs/_build/check
bash<span class="w"> </span>-n<span class="w"> </span>docs/build.sh
git<span class="w"> </span>diff<span class="w"> </span>--check
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>The same Sphinx check is available as <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">make</span> <span class="pre">-C</span> <span class="pre">docs</span> <span class="pre">check</span></code>. For a local HTML
and optional PDF build after dependencies are installed, run <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">./docs/build.sh</span></code>;
the script uses the same <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">-W</span></code> warnings-as-errors policy. Generated files stay
under <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">docs/_build/</span></code> and should not be committed.</p>
</section>

<section id="coding-standards">
<h2>Coding standards</h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>Keep changes deterministic and local.</p></li>
<li><p>Do not add network calls to the CLI.</p></li>
<li><p>Preserve idempotent extraction.</p></li>
<li><p>Preserve translated files across extraction.</p></li>
<li><p>Add tests for every behavior change.</p></li>
<li><p>Keep user-facing errors clear and actionable.</p></li>
<li><p>Prefer small format-specific adapters over cross-format special cases.</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="versioning">
<h2>Versioning</h2>
<p>Version data is generated by Hatch VCS into <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/_version.py</span></code>. Do not hand-edit generated version output.</p>
</section>
<section id="fresh-process-cli-tests">
<h2>Fresh-process CLI tests</h2>
<p>Some CLI bugs only manifest when each command runs in a fresh Python process.
The <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">CliRunner</span></code> used by most tests runs all commands in the same interpreter,
which can mask import-order issues (e.g. Pydantic forward-reference rebuilds).</p>
<p>When a bug involves cross-command state or module initialization, add a test
that uses <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">subprocess.run</span></code> to invoke <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx</span></code> in separate processes. See
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">tests/test_cli_translate_todo.py::test_todo_commands_work_across_fresh_python_processes</span></code>
for an example.</p>
</section>
<section id="durable-model-import-contracts">
<h2>Durable model import contracts</h2>
<p>Persisted JSON boundary models (<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">TranslationTask</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">TranslationTodo</span></code>,
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">TranslationStoreV2</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">TranslationVersionLedger</span></code>, context JSON models,
manifest/config models) must validate without hidden import-order requirements.</p>
<p>Rules:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>Never use <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">TYPE_CHECKING</span></code>-gated imports for types referenced in model fields.</p></li>
<li><p>Never depend on late <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">model_rebuild()</span></code> side effects for persisted models.</p></li>
<li><p>If a model references a type from another module, that type must be directly
importable at module load time.</p></li>
<li><p>Add a test in <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">tests/test_models.py</span></code> that validates minimal payloads for each
durable model without importing command-specific modules.</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
</section>
</div>
{% endraw %}
